MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMISI CALLOWAY, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.
SHAWN SALEHIEH, ESQ., 415.773.1270, FOR DEFENDANT FRED BAKER.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT SUBMITS PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
*AFTER HEARING, DEFENDANT FRED BAKER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED.*

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Continued To Oct-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SHAWN S. SALAHIEH OF THE PRESIDIO LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 773-1270 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE DUE TO A MEDICAL ISSUE. DEFENDANT FRED BAKER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 11, 2013 AT 9:30 A.M IN DEPT. 302.
COURT TO MAKE ARRANGEMENT FOR PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2013 Continued To Sep-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT FRED BAKER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's motion to September 20, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. for the Court to make arrangements for Plaintiff to have a telephone appearance. No opposition was filed. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
